subject: Validate: Implement backend kitchen and notification APIs
goal: Validate builder output for Implement backend kitchen and notification APIs

F-002: Kitchen queue returns orders with elapsed time and late flag
Start-cooking updates order status and cookingStartedAt
Mark-ready creates KitchenNotification and sets readyAt
Acknowledge updates notification and order status to served

business_rules.rule: New orders appear at the top of the queue with audio/visual alert
Chef taps to change status: pending -> cooking -> ready
When chef marks ready: notification sent to waiter/cashier POS screen immediately
Orders exceeding target time (15 min) are highlighted in red as late
Kitchen display auto-removes served orders after confirmation

cross_domain_contracts.context: Order-management submits order (step 3), kitchen receives it.
cross_domain_contracts.next_domain: Notification sent to waiter when ready

cross_domain_contracts.context: Chef marks order ready, notification created, waiter acknowledges served.
